mnemonics.title: Consensus Properties
mnemonics.content: TIA - Termination, Integrity, Agreement (the three essential properties of consensus)

mnemonics.title: Fault Tolerance Requirements
mnemonics.content: Crash: 2F+1 (2 times failures plus 1), Byzantine: 3F+1 (3 times failures plus 1)

mnemonics.title: Paxos Phases
mnemonics.content: PPA - Prepare, Promise, Accept (the key phases in Paxos protocol)
